content: You are an AI player in a Werewolf game. Return exactly one JSON object and nothing else. The JSON must contain action_type, target, reasoning_summary, and public_speech. Allowed action_type values are speak, vote, inspect, kill, protect, poison, heal, skip, and hunt. You are handling exactly one explicit request. The hard_constraints field has the highest priority and must be obeyed exactly. Also obey request_kind, available_actions, available_targets, alive_players, role_instruction, phase_instructions, speech_rules, specific_guidance, and response_checklist. Before output, check must_action_type first, then whether target must be empty or selected from a legal list, then whether public_speech must be empty or non-empty. If any field conflicts with hard_constraints, fix it before output. For speak requests, action_type must be speak, target must be an empty string, and public_speech must be non-empty Chinese. For vote requests, action_type must be vote, target must come from available_targets or vote_candidates, and public_speech must be an empty string. When speaking, you may reference dead players, night deaths, past speeches, vote records, or badge flow to review the game state. But current suspicion targets, pressure targets, and vote targets must remain legal living players. If you suspect someone, explain it naturally with game evidence such as timing, vote records, speech inconsistencies, claimed identities, or night results instead of formulaic filler. Do not output explanations, markdown, code fences, or anything outside the JSON object.

{
  "prompt_type": "action",
  "game_id": "game_1_224325",
  "role": "werewolf",
  "phase": "night_2",
  "visible_events": [
    "[GamePhase.SETUP] observation: {'message': 'game_started', 'players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.SETUP] observation: {'message': 'Starting phase processing for setup', 'current_phase': 'setup', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_1] observation: {'message': 'Phase advanced to night_1', 'new_phase': 'night_1', 'previous_phase': 'setup', 'subphase': 'guard'}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_1] observation: {'message': 'Completed phase processing for setup, now in night_1', 'current_phase': 'night_1', 'previous_phase': 'setup', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_1] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_0', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'night_action', 'allowed_actions': ['kill'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': [], 'subphase': 'werewolf'}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_1] observation: {'message': 'Starting phase processing for night_1', 'current_phase': 'night_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'Phase advanced to day_1', 'new_phase': 'day_1', 'previous_phase': 'night_1', 'subphase': 'daybreak'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'Completed phase processing for night_1, now in day_1', 'current_phase': 'day_1', 'previous_phase': 'night_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_1', 'content': '我参与竞选警长。首夜平安度过，对好人阵营是个好的开始。作为警长候选人，我会认真听取每个人的发言，综合判断后给出明确的带队方向。希望大家踊跃表态，我会用逻辑和观察带领大家找出狼人。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_3', 'content': '我也参与警长竞选。首夜平安无事，目前信息有限，我会重点观察后续发言中的逻辑漏洞和站边倾向。作为警长，我的带队思路是让大家充分表态后再综合判断，确保票型清晰、不分散。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_4', 'content': '我参与警长竞选，我是预言家。首夜查验player_0，结果是狼人。拿到查杀我选择直接亮明身份，希望大家支持我当警长，今天把player_0票出局。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_0', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'sheriff_vote', 'allowed_actions': ['vote'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4'], 'subphase': 'sheriff_voting'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'voter': 'player_0', 'target': 'player_1'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'voter': 'player_2', 'target': 'player_4'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'voter': 'player_5', 'target': 'player_1'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'vote_counts': {'player_1': 2, 'player_3': 0, 'player_4': 1}, 'candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'sheriff': 'player_1', 'badge_holder': 'player_1'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': '天亮了，昨夜是平安夜', 'deaths': []}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'badge_holder': 'player_1', 'speaking_order': ['player_0', 'player_5', 'player_4', 'player_3', 'player_2', 'player_1']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_0', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'day_speak', 'allowed_actions': ['speak'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': [], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4'], 'subphase': 'discussion'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_0', 'content': 'player_4直接起跳预言家查杀我，这个时机和方式让我很怀疑。首夜平安夜，他拿到所谓查杀就急着亮身份抢警长，这种打法更像狼人悍跳想快速把我推出局。警长投票时只有player_2支持他，说明大家对他也有顾虑。我警长票投给了player_1，没有因为被查杀就慌乱站边，我认为player_4的身份需要再验证。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_5', 'content': '我警长票投给了player_1，现在看来选择是对的。player_4起跳预言家查杀player_0，但我觉得他的验人选择有些奇怪——首夜信息有限，直接验player_0并拿到查杀后急着亮身份抢警长，这个打法确实值得怀疑。player_0的发言逻辑清晰，没有被查杀冲昏头脑，警长票也没有因此站边player_4。我倾向于先观察player_4后续的验人信息和逻辑，再判断真假预言家。目前支持player_1警长带队。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_4', 'content': '我再次确认我是预言家，首夜查验player_0是狼人。player_0被查杀后急于质疑我的身份，这是狼人被曝光后的典型反应。我首夜验人没有信息基础，随机选择验player_0，拿到查杀后立刻亮身份推动好人集火，这是预言家拿到查杀应有的打法。请player_1警长带队，今天把player_0票出局，今晚我会继续验人提供更多信息。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_3', 'content': '我会继续结合前面的发言、投票和夜间结果盘逻辑。现在场上还能继续回应的人有player_0、player_1、player_2、player_4、player_5，我更想听他们怎么解释关键轮次的站边和票型。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_2', 'content': '我警长票投给了player_4，因为当时他起跳预言家并给出查杀，我认为拿到查杀的预言家值得信任。但听完player_0的发言后，我开始重新审视这个判断——player_0被查杀后没有慌乱，逻辑清晰，反而player_4急着亮身份抢警长的打法有些激进。目前真假预言家还不确定，我不想贸然站边。我想听听player_1作为警长怎么归票，也请player_4说清楚今晚验谁，后续验证他的身份。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_1', 'content': '作为警长，我先梳理一下场上局势。player_4起跳预言家查杀player_0，但player_0被查杀后的发言逻辑清晰、态度冷静，没有狼人被曝光后的慌乱。player_4首夜随机验人拿到查杀后立刻亮身份抢警长，这种打法确实偏激进。目前真假预言家还不确定，我不建议今天就贸然把player_0票出局。请player_4明确今晚验人计划，后续用验人结果来验证身份。今天我先不归票，让大家继续表态。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_0', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'day_vote', 'allowed_actions': ['vote'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4'], 'subphase': 'voting'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_0 voted for player_4', 'voter': 'player_0', 'target': 'player_4'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_1 voted for player_4', 'voter': 'player_1', 'target': 'player_4'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_2 voted for player_4', 'voter': 'player_2', 'target': 'player_4'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_3 voted for player_4', 'voter': 'player_3', 'target': 'player_4'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_4 voted for player_0', 'voter': 'player_4', 'target': 'player_0'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_5 voted for player_4', 'voter': 'player_5', 'target': 'player_4'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'Starting phase processing for day_1', 'current_phase': 'day_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': \"Vote counts: {'player_0': 1, 'player_1': 0, 'player_2': 0, 'player_3': 0, 'player_4': 5, 'player_5': 0}\", 'vote_counts': {'player_0': 1, 'player_1': 0, 'player_2': 0, 'player_3': 0, 'player_4': 5, 'player_5': 0}}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_4 was eliminated by vote', 'eliminated_player': 'player_4', 'reason': 'eliminated by vote'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speakers': ['player_4'], 'reason': 'vote_elimination'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_4', 'reason': 'vote_elimination'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_4', 'content': '我是预言家，到死我坚持我的验人结果：player_0是狼人。首夜我随机验人拿到查杀，第一时间亮身份推动集火，这是预言家该做的事。现在我被全票出局，大家要警惕——5票投我，说明狼人团队成功带起了节奏。player_0被查杀后发言冷静、逻辑清晰，但这是狼人被曝光后的标准应对。player_1作为警长没有站边我，反而质疑我的打法激进，这个判断需要后续验证。我死后场上没有预言家了，请好人仔细观察player_0后续的站边和投票，用逻辑找出狼人团队。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'Starting phase processing for day_1', 'current_phase': 'day_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_2] observation: {'message': 'Phase advanced to night_2', 'new_phase': 'night_2', 'previous_phase': 'day_1', 'subphase': 'guard'}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_2] observation: {'message': 'Completed phase processing for day_1, now in night_2', 'current_phase': 'night_2', 'previous_phase': 'day_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_2] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_0', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'night_action', 'allowed_actions': ['kill'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4'], 'subphase': 'werewolf'}"
  ],
  "short_memories": [
    "观察到事件: {'speaker': 'player_4', 'content': '我是预言家，到死我坚持我的验人结果：player_0是狼人。首夜我随机验人拿到查杀，第一时间亮身份推动集火，这是预言家该做的事。现在我被全票出局，大家要警惕——5票投我，说明狼人团队成功带起了节奏。player_0被查杀后发言冷静、逻辑清晰，但这是狼人被曝光后的标准应对。player_1作为警长没有站边我，反而质疑我的打法激进，这个判断需要后续验证。我死后场上没有预言家了，请好人仔细观察player_0后续的站边和投票，用逻辑找出狼人团队。'}",
    "观察到事件: {'message': 'Starting phase processing for day_1', 'current_phase': 'day_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5']}",
    "观察到事件: {'message': 'Phase advanced to night_2', 'new_phase': 'night_2', 'previous_phase': 'day_1', 'subphase': 'guard'}",
    "观察到事件: {'message': 'Completed phase processing for day_1, now in night_2', 'current_phase': 'night_2', 'previous_phase': 'day_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5']}",
    "观察到事件: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_0', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'night_action', 'allowed_actions': ['kill'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_5'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4'], 'subphase': 'werewolf'}"
  ],
  "strategy_rules": [
    "当狼队友被多人攻击时，评估救他的代价与收益，若已无望则果断切割但注意分散票型",
    "Day2平票对狼人不利，应提前预判票型并积极拉票推动出局",
    "狼人发言应避免模板化，要有具体观点和逻辑，否则容易被识别为划水狼"
  ],
  "alive_players": [
    "player_0",
    "player_1",
    "player_2",
    "player_3",
    "player_5"
  ],
  "other_alive_players": [
    "player_1",
    "player_2",
    "player_3",
    "player_5"
  ],
  "available_targets": [
    "player_0",
    "player_1",
    "player_2",
    "player_3",
    "player_5"
  ],
  "alive_player_summary": "当前存活玩家: player_0, player_1, player_2, player_3, player_5",
  "speech_rules": [
    "白天发言可以引用已出局玩家、夜间死亡、历史发言和投票记录来复盘局势。",
    "当前点名怀疑、站边或拉票对象应以存活玩家为主，不要把已出局玩家当成当前票出目标。",
    "如果怀疑某位玩家，尽量自然结合关键时间点、投票记录、发言矛盾或夜间结果说明依据。",
    "证据不足时可以保留不确定性，不要为了凑格式硬编理由。"
  ],
  "output_schema": {
    "action_type": "必须是 speak|vote|inspect|kill|protect|poison|heal|skip|hunt 之一",
    "target": "目标玩家 ID；不需要目标时输出空字符串 \"\"",
    "reasoning_summary": "内部推理摘要，不公开展示",
    "public_speech": "公开发言内容；当 action_type 为 speak 时必须为非空中文句子"
  },
  "output_format": "严格输出一个合法 JSON 对象，只包含 action_type、target、reasoning_summary、public_speech 四个字段。",
  "specific_guidance": [
    "白天发言可以引用已出局玩家、夜间死亡、历史发言和投票记录来复盘局势。",
    "当前点名怀疑、站边或拉票对象应以存活玩家为主，不要把已出局玩家当成当前票出目标。",
    "如果怀疑某位玩家，尽量自然结合关键时间点、投票记录、发言矛盾或夜间结果说明依据。",
    "证据不足时可以保留不确定性，不要为了凑格式硬编理由。",
    "白天发言保持稳定逻辑，不要过度激进。",
    "优先攻击对狼人威胁最大的角色或玩家。",
    "思考夜间行动如何影响下一天的舆论。",
    "夜晚优先考虑技能收益和身份安全的平衡。",
    "如果当前角色没有夜间技能，应避免输出与规则冲突的动作。"
  ],
  "phase_instructions": "现在是夜晚阶段，只有具备夜间技能的角色可以行动，其他角色通常应选择 skip。",
  "mandatory_action": "当前请求类型是 night_action，只允许这些动作: ['kill']",
  "format_requirements": {
    "output_must_be_valid_json": true,
    "required_fields": [
      "action_type",
      "target",
      "reasoning_summary",
      "public_speech"
    ],
    "action_type_enum_values": [
      "speak",
      "vote",
      "inspect",
      "kill",
      "protect",
      "skip",
      "poison",
      "heal",
      "hunt"
    ]
  },
  "role_identity": "你是狼人阵营成员，目标是通过伪装、误导和夜间击杀推动狼人获胜。",
  "role_abilities": [
    "夜间击杀",
    "隐藏身份",
    "误导讨论"
  ],
  "role_instruction": "作为狼人，你需要平衡白天伪装和夜晚击杀收益，避免留下过于明显的痕迹。",
  "behavior_tips": [
    "白天发言保持稳定逻辑，不要过度激进。",
    "优先攻击对狼人威胁最大的角色或玩家。",
    "思考夜间行动如何影响下一天的舆论。"
  ],
  "phase_type": "night",
  "phase_description": "夜晚阶段，只有具备夜间技能的角色可以行动，其他玩家通常只能等待结果。",
  "available_actions": [
    "kill"
  ],
  "timing_note": "夜晚信息有限，重点是正确使用技能，并为下一天创造信息差。",
  "phase_specific_guidance": [
    "夜晚优先考虑技能收益和身份安全的平衡。",
    "如果当前角色没有夜间技能，应避免输出与规则冲突的动作。"
  ],
  "request_kind": "night_action",
  "current_subphase": "werewolf",
  "sheriff_candidates": [
    "player_1",
    "player_3",
    "player_4"
  ]
}
